Bash(/c/Python313/python.exe - << 'PYEOF'
import fitz

pdf_path = "C:/Users/zerrr/OneDrive/Desktop/ECE 340 LAB 4/Ece 340 lab 4 .pdf"
doc = fitz.open\(pdf_path\)
print\(f"Total pages: {len\(doc\)}"\)
for i, page in enumerate\(doc\):
    images = page.get_images\(full=True\)
    text_preview = page.get_text\(\)[:80].replace\('\\n', ' '\)
    print\(f"Page {i+1}: {len\(images\)} images | text: {text_preview}"\)
doc.close\(\)
PYEOF)

import fitz, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
pdf_path = 'C:/Users/zerrr/OneDrive/Desktop/ECE 340 LAB 4/Ece 340 lab 4 .pdf'
doc = fitz.open\(pdf_path\)
print\(f'Total pages: {len\(doc\)}'\)

doc.close\(\)

Bash(/c/Python313/python.exe -c "
import fitz, os, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
pdf_path = 'C:/Users/zerrr/OneDrive/Desktop/ECE 340 LAB 4/Ece 340 lab 4 .pdf'
out_dir = 'C:/Users/zerrr/OneDrive/Desktop/ECE 340 LAB 4/extracted_imgs'
os.makedirs\(out_dir, exist_ok=True\)
doc = fitz.open\(pdf_path\)
for page_num in range\(len\(doc\)\):
    page = doc[page_num]
    images = page.get_images\(full=True\)
    for img_idx, img_info in enumerate\(images\):
        xref = img_info[0]
        base_image = doc.extract_image\(xref\)
        img_bytes = base_image['image']
        ext = base_image['ext']
        fname = f'page{page_num+1}_img{img_idx+1}.{ext}'
        fpath = os.path.join\(out_dir, fname\)
        with open\(fpath, 'wb'\) as f:
            f.write\(img_bytes\)
        print\(f'Saved: {fname} \({len\(img_bytes\)} bytes\)'\)
doc.close\(\)
" 2>&1)
